memberdef.name: XPUF_PACK_PAYLOAD
memberdef.initializer: Payload[0U] = (u32)Arg0; \ Payload[1U] = (u32)Arg1; \ Payload[2U] = (u32)Arg2; \ Payload[3U] = (u32)Arg3; \ Payload[4U] = (u32)Arg4; \ Payload[5U] = (u32)Arg5;

briefdescription.para: Constructs a header value for PUF mailbox communication.

detaileddescription.para: This function encodes the payload length, module ID, and API ID into a single 32-bit value for use in PUF mailbox messages.

listitem.para: 32-bit header value combining payload length, module ID, and API ID.

briefdescription.para: This function sets slr index in the PUF client instance.

parameterdescription.para: Slr index to be set in instance

simplesect.para: This function is applicable to only Versal

listitem.para: Validate SlrIndex and assign it to instance pointer

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to the target module and gets the response from it.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the IPI send and receive is successful
XST_FAILURE if there is a failure

simplesect.para: Payload consists of API ID and call arguments to be written in IPI buffer.

listitem.para: Send CDO to PLM through IPI. Return XST_FAILURE if sending data failed.
Wait for IPI response from PLM and return the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This file contains declarations of xilmailbox generic interface APIs.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kpt 01/04/22 Initial release kpt 03/16/22 Removed IPI related code and added mailbox support 2.2 am 03/09/23 Moved payload length macros to xilmailbox.h file kal 09/14/23 Added XPuf_SetSlrIndex function 2.3 ng 11/22/23 Fixed doxygen grouping 2.4 ng 04/30/24 Fixed doxygen comments 2.5 obs 02/18/25 Fixed IPI message length 2.6 sd 04/13/26 Added PUF support for VERSAL_2VP_P
